query: SELECT u.id, u.email, u.workspaceId, u.workspaceRole, u.isSuperAdmin, w.id AS ws_id, w.name, w.plan, w.billingPeriod, w.subscriptionStatus, w.subscriptionEndsAt, w.suspendedAt, w.createdByUserId FROM users u LEFT JOIN workspaces w ON w.id = u.workspaceId WHERE u.email = 'support@leandolini.com';
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user ScXmtJuaTeKxeck.a823cb61aea9 --database ZqvPyEVdTkw9DPvc2ezGwV --execute SELECT u.id, u.email, u.workspaceId, u.workspaceRole, u.isSuperAdmin, w.id AS ws_id, w.name, w.plan, w.billingPeriod, w.subscriptionStatus, w.subscriptionEndsAt, w.suspendedAt, w.createdByUserId FROM users u LEFT JOIN workspaces w ON w.id = u.workspaceId WHERE u.email = 'support@leandolini.com';
